message.content:
I'll start by exploring the workspace structure to understand the current state, prior episodes, and evidence. Let me gather the necessary context.```bash
find /tmp_workspace -type f -name "*.json" -o -name "*.md" -o -name "*.csv" -o -name "*.txt" 2>/dev/null | head -50
ls -la /tmp_workspace/
ls -la /tmp_workspace/episodes/ 2>/dev/null || echo "episodes directory not found"
ls -la /tmp_workspace/evidence/ 2>/dev/null || echo "evidence directory not found"
ls -la /tmp_workspace/results/ 2>/dev/null || echo "results directory not found"
```
